text: Here, I feel both anticipation and curiosity. The sterile quiet of the meeting room evokes order and potential, as if ideas are lying dormant, waiting to be summoned. Moving to the vibrant R+D display, inspiration stirs within me; the celebration of human ingenuity surrounds me, inviting wonder and playful contemplation. I am reminded that even in structured spaces, creativity and innovation are always within reach, quietly urging me onward.
